metadata.description: Chewiesoft's plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Cursor — skills and commands for development workflows

plugins.name: cicd
plugins.description: GitHub Actions / Docker / GHCR pipeline troubleshooting and config — auto-routes backend (Prisma/Biome) vs frontend (Vite). Covers self-hosted runners (systemd and containerized via myoung34) including multi-job ephemeral token exhaustion. cd-pipeline-pitfalls reference covers: VITE/CRA/Next build args baked at image build time (frontend rebuild mandatory; /api path drift), operator clones on deploy host reverting running stack to stale compose, `docker compose --profile X run` reconciling unrelated services, and `compose run --rm` orphans poisoning the nginx-proxy/Traefik upstream pool — round-robin splits authenticated traffic between healthy backend and stale one-off, causing ~50% intermittent 401s with verifiably valid JWTs. v2.9.0: §7 self-hosted-runner-docker — deadlock-em-prod com `secrets.RUNNER_REGISTRATION_TOKEN` estática expirada, recovery em 3 passos. v2.10.0: cd-pipeline-pitfalls.md §5 — container scripts que resolvem output path upward de `__dirname`/`__file__` para a árvore de fontes batem em ENOENT em prod porque o Dockerfile só copia `packages/<self>/`; fix canônico é try/catch best-effort + console.log do artifact. v2.11.0: §5 refinement — narrow catch para ENOENT/ENOTDIR e propagar EACCES/ENOSPC/EROFS preserva visibilidade de problemas reais em dev (especialmente importante quando o artifact é consumido por sanity checks downstream tipo `auth-sanity.ts`). cd-pipeline-pitfalls.md §6 — GHA bind mount uid mismatch: container vendorado roda como uid 1000 (Postgres, Zitadel, vários runtimes), runner GHA `ubuntu-latest` é uid 1001 com pasta 0755 → EACCES no init/setup, e o estado parcial deixado para trás cascata em erros DIFERENTES nas retries (constraint violation, already-exists), burrying the real cause unless o operador volta para a PRIMEIRA tentativa nos logs; cura é pre-create do bind mount com `chmod 0777` antes do `docker compose up`. cd-pipeline-pitfalls.md §7 — `docker compose up -d --wait` por default espera TODOS os serviços com healthcheck; um sibling lento (Next.js/Vite/Webpack ~90s+ pra primeiro render no runner pequeno) estoura `--wait-timeout` para a stack inteira; cura é passar service names explícitos (`up --wait <svc1> <svc2>`); companion: sempre incluir o serviço lento no on-failure log dump com `|| true` mesmo quando não está no wait, senão debug futuro fica cego. NEW v2.12.0: troubleshooting-shared.md §1a — GHCR `net/http: TLS handshake timeout` no `docker login` do deploy job self-hosted é bug DISTINTO de §1 `unauthorized` e a confusão entre os dois custa ~30min de rotação de PAT inútil; isolation key é build-and-push em ubuntu-latest passar enquanto deploy em self-hosted falha (prova que GHCR está saudável e credencial é válida); causa raiz típica é MTU mismatch em VPN/overlay dropando Certificate frames ou proxy corporativo de TLS inspection; fix imediato é bash retry wrapper 3x com backoff 10s/20s ao redor de `docker login` no deploy job (Fix A — 20 linhas, sem dependência de action de terceiros), fix root é `mtu: 1400` em `/etc/docker/daemon.json` + restart docker (Fix B), com Fix C para hosts atrás de proxy corporativo. Triggers — CI/CD, GitHub Actions, workflow failing, GHCR auth, GHCR TLS handshake timeout, self-hosted runner, deploy keys, cutover prod, build-time vs runtime, queued runner, intermittent 401, split status codes, upstream pool stale, compose run orphan, docker-gen VIRTUAL_HOST, registration token expirado, gh-runner crashloop, runner-registration 404, chicken-and-egg, ENOENT bootstrap, soft-failure yellow warning fatigue, container script outside WORKDIR, GHA bind mount EACCES, container uid 1000 vs runner uid 1001, compose --wait scope, smoke-e2e timeout, docker login retry, MTU mismatch, TLS inspection proxy.

plugins.name: deploy
plugins.description: Automated deployment commands — staging and production pipelines via CD

plugins.name: codereview
plugins.description: Pre-PR review with severity grading and model routing (haiku/sonnet/opus). Detects TOCTOU races, accessibility gaps, hardcoded secrets (GitGuardian-equivalent regex), docs/OpenAPI sync. Multi-reviewer PR comment resolver (CodeRabbit, Copilot, Gemini, Codex). Stack-agnostic with TypeScript/React defaults and dotnet preset.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Interactive setup for Claude Code status line — customize model info (with optional effortLevel badge), context bar, git branch, cost tracking, and more. Cross-platform: Bash + PowerShell.

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Automated GitHub Release creation with categorized release notes from git history. Multi-stack (C#/.NET, Node.js, Go, Rust, Python) with --path filter for monorepo component releases. Contributor resolution via org membership cross-reference.

plugins.name: dotnet-wpf
plugins.description: C#/.NET WPF toolkit — project setup/audit, Fluent Design guide (90+ controls, layout troubleshooting, dark theme, branding), WinForms→WPF MVVM migration, and FlaUI E2E testing.

plugins.name: ddd
plugins.description: Domain-Driven Design toolkit — analyzes codebases for DDD violations, guides strategic design (event storming, context mapping), generates legacy→DDD migration specs. Language-agnostic. Synthesizes Evans + Vernon + modular-monolith practice.

plugins.name: retrofit-skill
plugins.description: Captures non-obvious session lessons and applies them to a target skill in this marketplace — bumps version, updates CHANGELOG, marketplace.json and README, commits and pushes.

plugins.name: dev-script
plugins.description: Generates idempotent dev.sh / dev.ps1 launchers for the current stack — Compose orchestration, healthchecks, two-strategy port handling (find-next-free discovery with peer-coordination env vars for foreign-owned service ports / kill-and-reclaim with pgrep fallback for own orphans), HTTPS-on-LAN via mkcert+Caddy, boot-time sanity check. Encodes the gotchas learned in JRC projects (Vite allowedHosts, JWKS over self-signed HTTPS, --tlsMode external, runtime drift detection, P17 foreign-port-owner + strictPort silent-hang cascade).

plugins.name: zitadel-idp
plugins.description: Self-hosted Zitadel OIDC field guide — bundles working docker-compose, idempotent bootstrap (TS) and reset script, plus 40 documented quirks with proto-aligned examples verified against raw GitHub Zitadel v4.15.0 (FirstInstance, JWT/JWKS over self-signed HTTPS, login UI v1 branding, masterkey-via-flag, post-reset 401 storms, login UI v2 separate container in v4, API v2 idempotence via deterministic IDs, contextual orgId header→body, CreateApplication discriminator = oidcConfiguration top-level, per-service ListResponse field names, CreateAuthorization exige organizationId, quirk 28 Login UI v2 auto-provisioning quebrado em v4.15.0). v0.5.0 — CD cutover survival kit (quirks 29-32). v0.6.0 — Console UI human-user pitfalls (quirks 33-35). v0.7.0 — Production cutover from PR #9: quirk 36 backend extra_hosts hairpin NAT JWKS reload; quirk 37 frontend 401-storm defense-in-depth (3 layers — ApiClient dedupe + TanStack retry filter + apiclient:unauthorized listener with auth-route guard). NEW v0.8.0 — THREE smoke-e2e CI quirks from validade_bateria_estoque PR #10: quirk 38 — `ZITADEL_FIRSTINSTANCE_PATPATH` bind mount EACCES on GHA runner (uid 1000 vs uid 1001 + 0755) cascades into a misleading `unique_constraints_pkey` on retries (looks exactly like quirk 28 #8910/#9293 but isn't — `setup failed, skipping cleanup` left `instance_domain=127.0.0.1.sslip.io` in the eventstore on the FIRST EACCES attempt; cure is `mkdir -p && chmod 0777` BEFORE `docker compose up`, NOT removing LoginClient envs); quirk 39 — default password policy requires all 4 char classes, `openssl rand -hex` is lowercase-only and dies with `COMMA-VoaRj` on AddHumanUser (cure: structured prefix `Aa1!` + alphanum random tail); quirk 40 — `zitadel-login` (Login UI v2 Next.js) needs ~90s+ for first healthcheck render on small CI runners, so `up --wait --wait-timeout 120` for the WHOLE stack times out even though Zitadel itself was Healthy long before (cure: scope `up --wait` to `zitadel-db zitadel-init zitadel` since bootstrap and REST tests don't exercise Login UI). Plus a new 'Smoke-e2e plumbing checklist for GHA' enumerating the 6 layers in causal order — chmod, scope --wait, 4-class password, prisma generate/migrate deploy on ephemeral Postgres, capture projectId from bootstrap.json into $GITHUB_ENV, always-dump on-failure logs — covering the layered breakage that rots under `continue-on-error: true` until someone tries to bring smoke-e2e back to green. Includes v2.66→v4 upgrade runbook + API v1→v2 Connect protocol mapping.
